```{r}
                                                  "HC_mod_filter" = theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                                                                       legend.direction = "horizontal",
                                                                       axis.text.x = element_text(angle =45, hjust = 1, size = 14.5, color = "black"),
                                                                       legend.title = element_blank(),
                                                                       axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17, vjust = 1, color = "black"),
                                                                       axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
                                                                       axis.title.x = element_text(size = 17, vjust = (-3), color = "black"),
                                                                       plot.margin = unit(c(0,1,0,1), "cm"),
                                                                       legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
                                                                       legend.box.spacing = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                                                                       legend.text = element_text(size = 15), color = "black"),
                                                   "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = theme(legend.position = "none",
                                                                             axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                                                                             legend.title = element_blank(),
                                                                             axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17, vjust = 1, color = "black"),
                                                                             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
                                                                            plot.margin = unit(c(1.5,1,2,1), "cm"))),
                           x_legend = list("PD_mod_filter" = c(0.263, 0.263),
                                                   "HC_mod_filter" = c(0.25, 0.25), 
                                                   "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = c(0.25, 0.25)),
                           
                           size_legend = list("PD_mod_filter" = 5,
                                                   "HC_mod_filter" = 5, 
                                                   "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = 5),

                           size_asterisk = list("PD_mod_filter" = 2.8,
                                                "HC_mod_filter" = 2.8, 
                                                "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = 2.8),
                           
                           angle_asterisk = list("PD_mod_filter" = 0,
                                                "HC_mod_filter" = 0, 
                                                "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = 0),

                           letter_fig = list("PD_mod_filter" = "D", "HC_mod_filter" = "F", "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = "E"),
                           theme_plot_title = list("PD_mod_filter" = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.02 ,size = 17, vjust = 1.1, face = "bold")),
                                                   "HC_mod_filter" = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.02 ,size = 17, vjust = 1.5, face = "bold")),
                                                   "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.02 ,size = 17, vjust = 4.5, face = "bold"))),
                           theme_health_disease_1 = list("PD_mod_filter" = theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0, 0, 0), "cm")), 
                                                         "HC_mod_filter" = theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0, 3.54, 0), "cm"), 
                                                                             legend.position = "none",
                                                                             axis.title.x = element_blank()), 
                                                         "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))),
                           theme_health_disease_2 = list("PD_mod_filter" = theme(
                                                                axis.line.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                                                                plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0.2, 0, 0.2), "cm")
                                                              ), 
                                                        "HC_mod_filter" = theme(
                                                                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 17, vjust = (-4), hjust = 0.3, color = "black"),
                                                                legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
                                                                legend.position = "none",
                                                                axis.line.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                                                                plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 0.2), "cm"),
                                                                legend.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm")
                                                              ), 
                                                        "GBA_NMC_mod_filter" = theme(
                                                                axis.line.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                                                                axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                                                                plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 0.2, 0, 0.2), "cm")
                                                              )),
                           width_two_plots = c(0.27, 1)
                           
)
                           
```

```{r}
plots_bis_combined <- plot_grid(list_plot_A_C[["plots"]][[1]], 
                                list_plot_D_F[["plots"]][[1]], 
                                list_plot_A_C[["plots"]][[2]], 
                                list_plot_D_F[["plots"]][[2]],
                                list_plot_A_C[["plots"]][[3]], 
                                list_plot_D_F[["plots"]][[3]],  
                                nrow = 3, ncol = 2, rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1.3))


```

```{r fig.width = 16, fig.height = 18, fig.show='asis'}
plot_final <- plot_grid(
  plots_bis_combined, list_plot_A_C[["legends"]][[1]], 
  ncol= 1, 
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.05)
)
plot_final
```



# Extended Figure 1
```{r}
# BARPLOT MSP CONTRAST - HC vs PD
my_grp_compa <- combn(vec_group, m = 2)
sign_lvl <- "p<0.05"

# sort the bars according to the cliffdeltas
testR_msp.sign_HC_PD.ord <- testR_msp.sign_HC_PD %>% arrange(desc(HC.PD_Cliffdelta))
testR_msp.sign_HC_PD.ord$common_msp_sign <- ifelse(testR_msp.sign_HC_PD.ord$msp %in% common_msp21, "bold", "plain")

bp_msp_HC_PD <- ggbarplot(testR_msp.sign_HC_PD.ord, x = "msp", y = "HC.PD_Cliffdelta", color = "white", fill = "HC.PD_status_Cliffdeltacorrected", rotate = T, xlab = "", ylab = "CD - HC.PD") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_HC_PD) + 
  ggtitle(paste("Prevalence > 10% ; ", paste0(my_grp_compa[1,2], " (n=", tab_group[my_grp_compa[1,2]], ") vs ", my_grp_compa[2,2], " (n=", tab_group[my_grp_compa[2,2]], ")", "; ", sign_lvl))) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1.2, size = 18), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, face = testR_msp.sign_HC_PD.ord$common_msp_sign), 
        legend.position = "none")
```



```{r}
# BARPLOT MSP CONTRAST - HC vs GBA_NMC
my_grp_compa <- combn(vec_group, m = 2)
sign_lvl <- "p<0.05"

# sort the bars according to the cliffdeltas
testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC.ord <- testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC %>% arrange(desc(HC.GBA_NMC_Cliffdelta))
testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC.ord$common_msp_sign <- ifelse(testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC.ord$msp %in% common_msp21, "bold", "plain")

bp_msp_HC_NMC <- ggbarplot(testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC.ord, x = "msp", y = "HC.GBA_NMC_Cliffdelta", color = "white", fill = "HC.GBA_NMC_status_Cliffdeltacorrected", rotate = T, xlab = "", ylab = "CD - HC.GBA_NMC") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_HC_GBA_NMC) + 
  ggtitle(paste("Prevalence > 10% ; ", paste0(my_grp_compa[1,1], " (n=", tab_group[my_grp_compa[1,1]], ") vs ", my_grp_compa[2,1], " (n=", tab_group[my_grp_compa[2,1]], ")", "; ", sign_lvl))) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 18), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, face = testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC.ord$common_msp_sign),
        legend.position = "none")
``` 


```{r, fig.height=35, fig.width=24, fig.show='asis'}
# MERGED BARPLOT HC vs PD/GBA_NMC
fig_contrast <- ggarrange(NULL, bp_msp_HC_PD, NULL, bp_msp_HC_NMC, ncol = 4, widths = c(0.1, 1.2,0.1, 1), labels = c("", "A", "", "B"), font.label = list(size = 25)) 
fig_contrast

``` 

# Extended Figure 2 - PD 

```{r}
# custom final barplot 
custom_theme <- theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
                      axis.title = element_text(size = 15), 
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
                      legend.title = element_blank(), 
                      legend.position = "none")

# name of final barplots 
name_sub_group <- c("Coherent enriched species", 
                    "Coherent depleted species", 
                    "Noncoherent enriched species", 
                    "Noncoherent depleted species") 
```


```{r, fig.width=8}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE QUARTILE - PD  

# Create a list of vectors containing abundances computed in PD individuals for each subtype 
PD_abund <- list(
  CE = list(data = grp_CE_abund$PD, type = "E"),
  CD = list(data = grp_CD_abund$PD, type = "D"),
  NE = list(data = grp_NE_abund$PD, type = "E"),
  ND = list(data = grp_ND_abund$PD, type = "D")
) 
# Apply "get_quartile" function to each vectors from "PD_abund"
# The function sort abundances in ascending way when it's enriched specie type and in decreasing way when it's depleted specie type  
# Then it split into quartile groups and compute mean of abundance for each quartile 
qPD_abund <- lapply(PD_abund, function(g){ get_quartile(g$data, g$type) })

# List of dataframe of that contains the mean abundances of each quartile for each subtype specie 
df_list_qPD_abund <- lapply(qPD_abund, function(g){ compute_mean(g) })


# Create list of abundance barplot for each specie type 
bp_list_qPD_abund <- list()
for (i in 1:length(df_list_qPD_abund)){
  bp_name <- name_sub_group[i]
  bp_color <- ifelse(str_detect(bp_name, ".*enriched.*"), PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col)
  bp <- ggbarplot(df_list_qPD_abund[[i]], x = "variable", y = "value", fill = bp_color, title = bp_name, ylab = "", xlab = "") + custom_theme
  bp_list_qPD_abund[[i]] <- bp
}

# Arrange barplot
fig_qPD_abund <- ggarrange(plotlist = bp_list_qPD_abund)
fig_qPD_abund <- annotate_figure(fig_qPD_abund, left = text_grob("Abundance (%)", color = "black", rot = 90, size = 15)) 
fig_qPD_abund
```




```{r, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4

# Compute fold change (FC) of mean abundance between Q1 and Q4 for each subtype specie 
# and create dataframe of FC of mean abundance Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
PD_abund_fc <- rbind(
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_abund$CE, "Coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_abund$CD, "Coherent", "Depleted species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_abund$NE, "Non-coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_abund$ND, "Non-coherent", "Depleted species")
  )
PD_abund_fc <- PD_abund_fc %>% 
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Enriched species", "Depleted species")))

# Create barplot of FC of mean abundance Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
fig_fc_qPD_abund <- ggbarplot(PD_abund_fc, 
                                x ="cat", 
                                y = "fc", 
                                fill = "status",
                                position = position_dodge(), 
                                palette = c(PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col),
                                title = "Abundance Fold Change Q1 - Q4") + 
  theme_classic() + xlab("") + ylab("") + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Coherent" = "Coherent\nspecies", 
                            "Non-coherent" = "Noncoherent\nspecies")) + 
  expand_limits(y = c(0,4)) + custom_theme

fig_fc_qPD_abund
```


```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT PROPORTION QUARTILE

# Create a list of vectors containing proportions computed in PD individuals for each subtype 
PD_prop <- list(
  CE = list(data = grp_CE_prop$PD, type = "E"),
  CD = list(data = grp_CD_prop$PD, type = "D"),
  NE = list(data = grp_NE_prop$PD, type = "E"),
  ND = list(data = grp_ND_prop$PD, type = "D")
) 
qPD_prop <- lapply(PD_prop, function(g){ get_quartile(g$data, g$type) })

# List of dataframe of means of proportions in each quartile for each subtype 
df_list_qPD_prop <- lapply(qPD_prop, function(g){ compute_mean(g) })


# Create list of proportion barplot for each specie type 
bp_list_qPD_prop <- list()
for (i in 1:length(df_list_qPD_prop)){
  bp_name <- name_sub_group[i]
  bp_color <- ifelse(str_detect(bp_name, ".*enriched.*"), PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col)
  bp <- ggbarplot(df_list_qPD_prop[[i]], x = "variable", y = "value", fill = bp_color, title = bp_name, ylab = "", xlab = "") + custom_theme
  bp_list_qPD_prop[[i]] <- bp
}

# Arrange barplot
fig_qPD_prop <- ggarrange(plotlist = bp_list_qPD_prop)
fig_qPD_prop <- annotate_figure(fig_qPD_prop, left = text_grob("Proportion (%)", color = "black", rot = 90, size = 15)) 
fig_qPD_prop
```





```{r}
# PROPORTION FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4 - PD

# Compute fold change (FC) of mean proportion between Q1 and Q4 for each subtype specie 
# and create dataframe of FC of mean proportion Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
PD_prop_fc <- rbind(
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_prop$CE, "Coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_prop$CD, "Coherent", "Depleted species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_prop$NE, "Non-coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qPD_prop$ND, "Non-coherent", "Depleted species")
  )
PD_prop_fc <- PD_prop_fc %>% 
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Enriched species", "Depleted species")))

# Create barplot of FC of mean proportion Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie
fig_fc_qPD_prop <- ggbarplot(PD_prop_fc, 
                             x ="cat", 
                             y = "fc", 
                             fill = "status", 
                             position = position_dodge(), 
                             palette = c(PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col), 
                             title = "Proportion Fold Change Q1 - Q4") + 
  theme_classic() + xlab("") + ylab("") + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Coherent" = "Coherent\nspecies", 
                          "Non-coherent" = "Noncoherent\nspecies")) + 
  expand_limits(y = c(0,4)) + custom_theme

fig_fc_qPD_prop
```




```{r, fig.height=11, fig.width = 8, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT PROPORTION & ABUNDANCE QUARTILE - PD
fig_qPD_left <- ggarrange(fig_qPD_abund, fig_qPD_prop, nrow = 2, labels = c("A","B"), font.label = list(size = 17))
fig_qPD_left
```


```{r, fig.height=11, fig.width = 8, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT ABUND/PROP FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4 - PD
fig_qPD_right <- ggarrange(fig_fc_qPD_abund, fig_fc_qPD_prop, nrow = 2, labels = c("C","D"), font.label = list(size = 17))
fig_qPD_right
``` 


```{r, fig.height=9, fig.width = 13, fig.show='asis'}
# MERGED ABUND/PROP QUARTILE AND ABUND/PROP FC QUARTILE
fig_qPD_top <- ggarrange(fig_qPD_left, fig_qPD_right, ncol = 2, widths = c(2, 0.9))
fig_qPD_top 
``` 



# Extended Figure 3
```{r, results='hide'}
# PROPORTION - Medication on microbiome alterations in PD

# select 32 PD drug naive individuals
PD_drug_naive_ind <- temp_metadata %>% 
  dplyr::filter(group_bis == "PD" & pd_drug_naive == "yes") %>% 
  pull(MGP_ID_fecal_baseline)

# select 47 PD medicated with lowest disease duration individuals (that matched for the mean duration of disease of drug-naive)
select_PD_med_ind <- paste0("ASAPh_", c("1138", "557", "1106", "1118", "334", "1140", "230", "223", "682", "629", "359", "656", "241", "964", "801", "1165", "1091", "641", "358", "212", "094", "074", "627", "055", "1095", "831", "597", "009", "035", "598", "260", "566", "054", "1083", "609", "248", "350", "250", "967", "976", "021", "966", "1115", "071", "1089", "617", "667"))


vec_sub_group <- c("CE", "NE", "CD", "ND") 
# In PD drug naive individuals, compute proportion of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP 
pd_drug_naive_prop <- compute_prop_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_drug_naive_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# In PD medicated individuals, compute proportion of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP 
pd_med_prop <- compute_prop_subtype(vec_sub_group, select_PD_med_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# Student test
pd_dose_prop_ttest <- compute_ttest(pd_drug_naive_prop, pd_med_prop, grp = "ledd_status", grp_label = c("No_levodopa", "Yes_levodopa"))

# compute mean proportion of MSP for PD drug naive and PD specific individuals
tab_pd_dose_prop_melt <- show_mean_tab(pd_drug_naive_prop, pd_med_prop, vec_cat = c("No_levodopa", "Yes_levodopa")) 

tab_pd_dose_prop_melt <- tab_pd_dose_prop_melt %>% 
  mutate(variable_bis = ifelse(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"), "Enriched", "Depleted")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = paste(variable_bis, cat, sep = "_")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = factor(cat_color, levels = c("Enriched_No_levodopa", "Enriched_Yes_levodopa", "Depleted_No_levodopa", "Depleted_Yes_levodopa")))

pd_dose_color <- setNames(c(rep(PD_enriched_hue, 2), rep(PD_depleted_hue, 2)),  tab_pd_dose_prop_melt$cat_color)  
```


```{r, fig.width=9}
# barplot 
my_compa <- c("No_levodopa", "Yes_levodopa")
bp_PD_med_prop <- ggbarplot(tab_pd_dose_prop_melt, x = "variable", y = "value", fill = "cat_color", position = position_dodge()) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = pd_dose_color) +
  ylab("MSP mean proportion (%)") + 
  theme_classic()+
  ggtitle("Proportion of the altered microbiome in PD patients") + 
  theme(legend.title=element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("CE" = "Enriched coherent\nspecies", 
                            "NE" = "Enriched\nnoncoherent species",
                            "CD" = "Depleted coherent\nspecies", 
                            "ND" = "Depleted\nnoncoherent species")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 16, 1)) + 
  geom_text(data = pd_dose_prop_ttest, aes(x=y, y=15, label=paste0("Student.p:\n", p)), size = 5) 
``` 


```{r}
# ABUNDANCE - Medication on microbiome alterations in PD
vec_sub_group <- c("CE", "NE", "CD", "ND")

# In PD drug naive individuals (No levodopa), sum abundance of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP (CE, NE, CD, ND)
pd_dnaive_abund <- compute_abund_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_drug_naive_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# In PD medicated individuals (Yes levodopa, and dose matched), sum abundance of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP (CE, NE, CD, ND)
pd_med_abund <- compute_abund_subtype(vec_sub_group, select_PD_med_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# Student test
pd_dose_abund_ttest <- compute_ttest(pd_dnaive_abund, pd_med_abund, grp = "ledd_status", grp_label = c("No_levodopa", "Yes_levodopa"))
```


```{r, fig.width = 10}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE - DRUG NAIVE VS MEDICATED IN PD 

# compute mean abundance for each PD species type according to medication and build table of mean abundance  
tab_pd_dose_abund_melt <- show_mean_tab(pd_dnaive_abund, pd_med_abund, vec_cat = c("No_levodopa", "Yes_levodopa"))

tab_pd_dose_abund_melt <- tab_pd_dose_abund_melt %>% 
  mutate(variable_bis = ifelse(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"), "Enriched", "Depleted")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = paste(variable_bis, cat, sep = "_")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = factor(cat_color, levels = c("Enriched_No_levodopa", "Enriched_Yes_levodopa", "Depleted_No_levodopa", "Depleted_Yes_levodopa")))

pd_dose_color <- setNames(c(rep(PD_enriched_hue, 2), rep(PD_depleted_hue, 2)),  tab_pd_dose_abund_melt$cat_color)
```



```{r}
# PROPORTION - DISEASE DURATION in PD
# For study the duration of disease effect on microbiome : 61 PD individuals with different disease duration (4.2 and 7.2 years on average, N=30 and N=31 respectively) that matched for the mean dose of levodopa (600 mg on average). 

# select 30 short duration PD individuals 
PD_short_ind <- paste0("ASAPh_", c("359", "212", "566", "1083", "021", "006", "020", "371", "261", "030", "266", "1149", "989", "688", "353", "267", "968", "852", "588", "606", "363", "618", "235", "585", "381", "1101", "1098", "091", "022", "010"))

# select 31 long duration PD individuals
PD_long_ind <- paste0("ASAPh_", c("335", "988", "649", "043", "352", "038", "036", "643", "987", "040", "067", "817", "098", "031", "355", "828", "033", "005", "234", "049", "603", "342", "254", "991", "251", "690", "819", "237", "624", "354", "376"))

# extract the pd_dur and ledd_total for the 61 individuals  
select_PD_data <- temp_metadata[c(PD_short_ind, PD_long_ind),] 
select_PD_data <- select_PD_data %>% 
  mutate(pd_dur_cat = ifelse(rownames(select_PD_data) %in% PD_short_ind, "shorter", "longer"))
select_PD_data <- select_PD_data %>% dplyr::select(group_bis, pd_dur, pd_dur_cat, ledd_total)
``` 



```{r}
# In PD shorter duration disease, compute the count and the proportion of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP
pd_short_prop <- compute_prop_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_short_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# In PD longer duration disease, compute the count and the proportion of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP
pd_long_prop <- compute_prop_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_long_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# compute mean proportion for each species type according to PD duration and build table of mean proportion
tab_pd_duration_prop_melt <- show_mean_tab(pd_short_prop, pd_long_prop, vec_cat = c("shorter", "longer"))

# Student test
pd_duration_prop_ttest <- compute_ttest(pd_short_prop, pd_long_prop, grp = "pd_duration", grp_label = c("shorter", "longer")) 
```



```{r, fig.width=9, results='markup', fig.show='hide'}
# PROPORTION - Disease duration on microbiome alterations in PD

tab_pd_duration_prop_melt <- tab_pd_duration_prop_melt %>% 
  mutate(variable_bis = ifelse(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"), "Enriched", "Depleted")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = paste(variable_bis, cat, sep = "_")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = factor(cat_color, levels = c("Enriched_shorter", "Enriched_longer", "Depleted_shorter", "Depleted_longer"))) 
pd_duration_color <- setNames(c(rep(PD_enriched_hue, 2), rep(PD_depleted_hue, 2)), tab_pd_duration_prop_melt$cat_color)
```


```{r}
# ABUNDANCE - DISEASE DURATION IN PD 
vec_sub_group <- c("CE", "NE", "CD", "ND")

# In PD shorter duration disease individuals, sum abundance of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP
pd_short_abund <- compute_abund_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_short_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# In PD longer duration disease individuals, sum abundance of all MSP and of each subgroup MSP
pd_long_abund <- compute_abund_subtype(vec_sub_group, PD_long_ind, msp_fecal.filt10)

# compute mean abundance for each type according to shorter or longer duration and build table of mean 
tab_pd_duration_abund_melt <- show_mean_tab(pd_short_abund, pd_long_abund, vec_cat = c("shorter", "longer"))

# Student test
pd_duration_abund_ttest <- compute_ttest(pd_short_abund, pd_long_abund, grp = "pd_duration", grp_label = c("shorter", "longer"))  
```


    
```{r, fig.width = 8}
# ABUNDANCE - DISEASE DURATION IN PD
tab_pd_duration_abund_melt <- tab_pd_duration_abund_melt %>% 
  mutate(variable_bis = ifelse(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"), "Enriched", "Depleted")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = paste(variable_bis, cat, sep = "_")) %>% 
  mutate(cat_color = factor(cat_color, levels = c("Enriched_shorter", "Enriched_longer", "Depleted_shorter", "Depleted_longer")))

pd_duration_color <- setNames(c(rep(PD_enriched_hue, 2), rep(PD_depleted_hue, 2)),  tab_pd_duration_abund_melt$cat_color) 
``` 


```{r, fig.width=10}
# MIX BARPLOT - DOSE EFFECT IN PD (drug naive vs medicated)
# enriched represented by abundance and depleted represented by proportion
select_dose_abund <- tab_pd_dose_abund_melt %>% filter(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"))
select_dose_prop <- tab_pd_dose_prop_melt %>% filter(variable %in% c("CD","ND"))
tab_select_dose <- select_dose_abund %>% rbind(select_dose_prop)

# bind the abundance ttest for enriched species with the proportion ttest for depleted species 
pd_dose_select_test <- pd_dose_abund_ttest %>% filter(y %in% c("CE", "NE")) %>%
  rbind(pd_dose_prop_ttest %>% filter(y %in% c("CD", "ND")))
# round pval at 2 decimals
pd_dose_select_test <- pd_dose_select_test %>% mutate(p = round(p, 3))

# barplot
bp_dose_mix <- ggbarplot(tab_select_dose, x = "variable", y = "value", fill = "cat_color", position = position_dodge2(), title = "Effect of medication on microbiome alterations in PD", ylab = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pd_dose_color) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(title = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15), 
        legend.title=element_blank(), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14.5), 
        legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.key.size = unit(1, 'cm'), 
        legend.key.spacing.x = unit(1, "cm")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(label.position = "bottom")) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("CE" = "Enriched coherent\nspecies\n(mean abund.)",
                            "NE" = "Enriched\nnoncoherent species\n(mean abund.)",
                            "CD" = "Depleted coherent\nspecies\n(mean prop.)",
                            "ND" = "Depleted\nnoncoherent species\n(mean prop.)")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 15, 1)) +
  expand_limits(y = c(0, 17)) +
  geom_text(data = pd_dose_select_test, aes (x=y, y=16, label = paste0("Student.p:\n", p)), size = 7)

bp_dose_mix
```



```{r, fig.width=8}
# MIX BARPLOT - DISEASE DURATION IN PD 
# enriched represented by abundance and depleted represented by proportion
select_duration_abund <- tab_pd_duration_abund_melt %>% filter(variable %in% c("CE", "NE"))
select_duration_prop <- tab_pd_duration_prop_melt %>% filter(variable %in% c("CD","ND"))
tab_select_duration <- select_duration_abund %>% rbind(select_duration_prop)

# bind the abundance ttest for enriched species with the proportion ttest for depleted species 
pd_duration_select_test <- pd_duration_abund_ttest %>% filter(y %in% c("CE", "NE")) %>%
  rbind(pd_duration_prop_ttest %>% filter(y %in% c("CD", "ND")))
pd_duration_select_test <- pd_duration_select_test %>% mutate(p = round(p, 3))

# barplot
bp_duration_mix <- ggbarplot(tab_select_duration, x = "variable", y = "value", fill = "cat_color", position = position_dodge2(), title = "Effect of disease duration on microbiome alterations in PD", ylab = "") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = pd_duration_color) + 
  theme_classic()+
  theme(title = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title=element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14.5),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key.size = unit(1, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.x = unit(1, "cm")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(label.position = "bottom")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("CE" = "Enriched coherent\nspecies\n(mean abund.)",
                            "NE" = "Enriched\nnoncoherent species\n(mean abund.)",
                            "CD" = "Depleted coherent\nspecies\n(mean prop.)",
                            "ND" = "Depleted\nnoncoherent species\n(mean prop.)")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 15, 1)) +
  expand_limits(y = c(0, 17)) +
  geom_text(data = pd_duration_select_test, aes(x=y, y=16, label = paste0("Student.p:\n", p)), size = 7)
  
bp_duration_mix
```



```{r, fig.height=9, fig.width=21, fig.show='asis'}
fig_medication_duration <- ggarrange(bp_dose_mix, NULL, bp_duration_mix, ncol = 3, labels = c("A", "", "B"), widths = c(1, 0.06, 1.04), font.label = list(size = 23))
fig_medication_duration
```
 

# Extended Figure 4
```{r}
# Create a list of vectors containing abundances/proportions computed in GBA_NMC individuals for each subtype (CE and CD) 
NMC_coh <- list(
  CE_abund = list(data = grp_CE_abund$GBA_NMC, type = "E"),
  CD_abund = list(data = grp_CD_abund$GBA_NMC, type = "D"),
  CE_prop = list(data = grp_CE_prop$GBA_NMC, type = "E"),
  CD_prop = list(data = grp_CD_prop$GBA_NMC, type = "D")
)

# Apply "get_median" function to each vectors from "NMC_coherent"
# The function sort abundances/proportions in ascending way when it's enriched specie type and in decreasing way when it's depleted specie type  
# Then it split into median groups and compute mean of abundance/proportion for each median groups  
median_NMC_coh <- lapply(NMC_coherent, function(g){ get_median(g$data, g$type)}) 


# List of dataframe of that contains the mean abundances/proportions of each subgroup for each subtype specie 
median_NMC_means <- lapply(median_NMC_coh, function(g) { compute_mean(g)})

# check 
length(median_NMC_coh$CD_abund$below)
length(median_NMC_coh$CD_abund$above)

length(median_NMC_coh$CE_abund$below)
length(median_NMC_coh$CE_abund$above)
```

 
```{r}
# Student test of median groups (below vs above) 
median_NMC_test <- lapply(median_NMC_coh, function(g) { 
  direction <- ifelse(mean(g$below) < mean(g$above), "less", "greater")  
  ttest_res <- t.test(g$below, g$above, alternative = direction, var.equal = T)
  signif(ttest_res$p.value, 3) 
  }) %>% unlist()
 
# Fold Change of means (below vs above)
median_NMC_fc <- lapply(median_NMC_means, function(g) {
  min_val <- min(g$value)
  max_val <- max(g$value)
  fc <- foldchange(max_val, min_val)
  signif(fc, 3)
}) %>% unlist() 
```
 
 
```{r}
# BARPLOT MEDIAN - GBA_NMC
name_median <- setNames(c("Abundance of coherent PD\nenriched species", 
                          "Abundance of coherent PD\ndepleted species",
                          "Proportion of coherent PD\nenriched species",
                          "Proportion of coherent PD\ndepleted species"), names(median_NMC_means))

bp_median_list <- list()
for (metric in names(median_NMC_means)){
  data <- median_NMC_means[[metric]]
  bp_title <- name_median[[metric]]
  bp_color <- ifelse(str_detect(bp_title, ".*enriched.*"), PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col)
  p <- show_barplot(data, 
                    x = "variable",
                    y = "value", 
                    fill = bp_color, 
                    title = bp_title, 
                    show_legend = "right", 
                    limits = c(0, round(max(data$value))+2), 
                    pas = 2, 
                    ylab = "%", 
                    size_title = 16.5, size_title_axis = 17, size_axis_text = 16) + 
    annotate(geom = "text", label = paste("FC:", median_NMC_fc[[metric]]), x = 1.5, y=round(max(data$value))+3, size = 5) + 
    annotate(geom = "text", label = paste("Student.p:", median_NMC_test[[metric]]), x=1.5, y=round(max(data$value))+1.5, size = 5)

  bp_median_list[[metric]] <- p
}

bp_median_list
```

```{r}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE COHERENT MEDIAN
fig_median_top <- ggarrange(bp_median_list$CE_abund, bp_median_list$CD_abund, ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"), font.label = list(size = 17))

# BARPLOT PROPORTION COHERENT MEDIAN
fig_median_bottom <- ggarrange(bp_median_list$CE_prop, bp_median_list$CD_prop, ncol = 2, labels = c("C", "D"), font.label = list(size = 17))

fig_median_top
fig_median_bottom
```
 
```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=8, fig.show='asis'}
# FINAL ABUND/PROP COHERENT MEDIAN
fig_median <- ggarrange(fig_median_top, "", fig_median_bottom, nrow = 3, heights = c(1, 0.05 ,1))
fig_median
```
 

# Extended Figure 5 - HC

```{r, fig.width=8}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE QUARTILE  

# Create a list of vectors containing abundances computed in HC individuals for each subtype 
HC_abund <- list(
  CE = list(data = grp_CE_abund$HC, type = "E"),
  CD = list(data = grp_CD_abund$HC, type = "D"),
  NE = list(data = grp_NE_abund$HC, type = "E"),
  ND = list(data = grp_ND_abund$HC, type = "D")
) 

# Apply "get_quartile" function to each vectors from "HC_abund"
# The function sort abundances in ascending way when it's enriched specie type and in decreasing way when it's depleted specie type  
# Then it split into quartile groups and compute mean of abundance for each quartile 
qHC_abund <- lapply(HC_abund, function(g){ get_quartile(g$data, g$type)}) 

# List of dataframe of that contains the mean abundances of each quartile for each subtype specie 
df_list_qHC_abund <- lapply(qHC_abund, function(g) { compute_mean(g)})
 

# Create list of abundance barplot for each specie type 
bp_list_qHC_abund <- list()
for (i in 1:length(df_list_qHC_abund)){
  bp_name <- name_sub_group[i]
  bp_color <- ifelse(str_detect(bp_name, ".*enriched.*"), PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col)
  bp <- ggbarplot(df_list_qHC_abund[[i]], x = "variable", y = "value", fill = bp_color, title = bp_name, ylab = "", xlab = "") + custom_theme
  bp_list_qHC_abund[[i]] <- bp
}

# Arrange barplot
fig_qHC_abund <- ggarrange(plotlist = bp_list_qHC_abund)
fig_qHC_abund <- annotate_figure(fig_qHC_abund, left = text_grob("Abundance (%)", color = "black", rot = 90, size = 15)) 
fig_qHC_abund
```



```{r, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT ABUNDANCE FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4 - HC

# Compute fold change (FC) of mean abundance between Q1 and Q4 for each subtype specie 
# and create dataframe of FC of mean abundance Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
HC_abund_fc <- rbind(
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_abund$CE, "Coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_abund$CD, "Coherent", "Depleted species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_abund$NE, "Non-coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_abund$ND, "Non-coherent", "Depleted species"))

HC_abund_fc <- HC_abund_fc %>% 
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Enriched species", "Depleted species")))  

# Create barplot of FC of mean abundance Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
fig_fc_qHC_abund <- ggbarplot(HC_abund_fc, 
                              x ="cat", 
                              y = "fc", 
                              fill = "status", 
                              position = position_dodge(), 
                              palette = c(PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col), 
                              title = "Abundance Fold Change Q1 - Q4") + 
  theme_classic() + xlab("") + ylab("") + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Coherent" = "Coherent\nspecies", 
                            "Non-coherent" = "Noncoherent\nspecies")) + 
  expand_limits(y = c(0,4)) + custom_theme

fig_fc_qHC_abund
```


```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT PROPORTION QUARTILE - HC

# Create a list of vectors containing proportions computed in HC individuals for each subtype 
HC_prop <- list(
  CE = list(data = grp_CE_prop$HC, type = "E"),
  CD = list(data = grp_CD_prop$HC, type = "D"),
  NE = list(data = grp_NE_prop$HC, type = "E"),
  ND = list(data = grp_ND_prop$HC, type = "D")
)

# Apply "get_quartile" function to each vectors from "HC_prop"
# The function sort proportions in ascending way when it's enriched specie type and in decreasing way when it's depleted specie type  
# Then it split into quartile groups and compute mean of proportion for each quartile 
qHC_prop <- lapply(HC_prop, function(g){ get_quartile(g$data, g$type)})

# List of dataframe of that contains the mean proportions of each quartile for each subtype specie 
df_list_qHC_prop <- lapply(qHC_prop, function(g) { compute_mean(g)})


# Create list of proportion barplot for each specie type 
bp_list_qHC_prop <- list()
for (i in 1:length(df_list_qHC_prop)){
  bp_name <- name_sub_group[i]
  bp_color <- ifelse(str_detect(bp_name, ".*enriched.*"), PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col)
  # barplot 
  bp <- ggbarplot(df_list_qHC_prop[[i]], x = "variable", y = "value", fill = bp_color, title = bp_name, ylab = "", xlab = "") + custom_theme
  bp_list_qHC_prop[[i]] <- bp
}

# Arrange barplot
fig_qHC_prop <- ggarrange(plotlist = bp_list_qHC_prop)
fig_qHC_prop <- annotate_figure(fig_qHC_prop, left = text_grob("Proportion (%)", color = "black", rot = 90, size = 15)) 
fig_qHC_prop
```

```{r}
# PROPORTION FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4 - HC

# Compute fold change (FC) of mean proportion between Q1 and Q4 for each subtype specie 
# and create dataframe of FC of mean proportion Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
HC_prop_fc <- rbind(
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_prop$CE, "Coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_prop$CD, "Coherent", "Depleted species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_prop$NE, "Non-coherent", "Enriched species"),
  process_fc(df_list_qHC_prop$ND, "Non-coherent", "Depleted species"))

HC_prop_fc <- HC_prop_fc %>% 
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Enriched species", "Depleted species")))  

# Create barplot of FC of mean proportion Q1-Q4 for each subtype specie 
fig_fc_qHC_prop <- ggbarplot(HC_prop_fc, 
                             x ="cat", 
                             y = "fc", 
                             fill = "status", 
                             position = position_dodge(), 
                             palette = c(PD_enriched_col, PD_depleted_col), 
                             title = "Proportion Fold Change Q1 - Q4") + 
  theme_classic() + xlab("") + ylab("") + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Coherent" = "Coherent\nspecies", 
                          "Non-coherent" = "Noncoherent\nspecies")) + 
  expand_limits(y = c(0,4)) + custom_theme

fig_fc_qHC_prop
```


```{r, fig.height=11, fig.width = 8, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT PROP AND ABUND QUARTILE - HC
fig_qHC_left <- ggarrange(fig_qHC_abund, fig_qHC_prop, nrow = 2, labels = c("A","B"), font.label = list(size = 17))
fig_qHC_left
```


```{r, fig.height=11, fig.width = 8, fig.show='hide'}
# BARPLOT ABUND/PROP FC QUARTILE Q1 Q4 - HC
fig_qHC_right <- ggarrange(fig_fc_qHC_abund, fig_fc_qHC_prop, nrow = 2, labels = c("C","D"), font.label = list(size = 17))
fig_qHC_right
``` 


```{r, fig.height=9, fig.width = 13, fig.show='asis'}
# MERGED ABUND/PROP QUARTILE AND ABUND/PROP FC QUARTILE - HC
fig_qHC_top <- ggarrange(fig_qHC_left, fig_qHC_right, ncol = 2, widths = c(2, 0.9))
fig_qHC_top 
``` 


# Extended Figure 6 

```{r}
testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC_ht <- testR_msp.sign_HC_GBA_NMC
testR_msp.sign_HC_PD_ht <- testR_msp_HC_PD %>%
                              filter(q < 0.1)


MSP_set$msp_id_name <- paste(MSP_set$msp_id, MSP_set$species)

variable_select_clinic <- var_tab[!var_tab %in% c("Fruit", "Vegetables", "sleepiness",           "appendectomy","appendectomy_pd_yearsdiff","sex","education_n_years","ed_yrs" )] 


groups_select <- list(c("HC", "GBA_NMC"),
                c("HC", "PD"))

list_correlation_variable <- list()
list_plot_cor <- list()
list_legend_cor <- list()
list_merge <- list()
leg_cor <- list()
leg_gp <- list()

for (gps in groups_select){
  
  if (gps[1] == "HC" & gps[2] == "GBA_NMC"){
     size_lgd_gp = gpar(fontsize = 17)
     size_label_gp = gpar(fontsize =15)
     rownames_size = 15
     colnames_size = 15
     leg_cor[[1]] <- leg_gp[[1]] <- 15
     leg_cor[[2]] <- leg_gp[[2]] <- 17
     leg_gp[[3]] <- leg_gp[[4]] <- 0.5
     
  } else if (gps[1] == "HC" & gps[2] == "PD"){
     size_lgd_gp = gpar(fontsize = 22)
     size_label_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)
     rownames_size = 20
     colnames_size = 25
     leg_cor[[1]] <- leg_gp[[1]] <- 25
     leg_cor[[2]] <- leg_gp[[2]] <- 27
     leg_gp[[3]] <- leg_gp[[4]] <- 0.8
  }
  
  names_file_cor <- paste("correlation", gps[1], gps[2], sep="_")
  
  if ("PD" %in% gps){
    select_data <- temp_metadata %>%
      filter(group_bis %in% c(gps[1], gps[2]))
  } else {
    select_data <- temp_metadata %>%
      filter(group_bis %in% c(gps[1], gps[2]))
  }
  
  name_to_select <- paste("sign", gps[1], gps[2], "ht",sep= "_")
  
  
  ### for file with msp 
  df_testR_msp <- get(paste("testR_msp", name_to_select, sep = "."))
  
  row_ha <-  HeatmapAnnotation(
        status = df_testR_msp[[13]],
        col = list(status = unlist(group_bis_color[c(gps[1], gps[2])])),
        which = "row",
        show_annotation_name = F,
        show_legend = FALSE
       )


  
  assign("df_testR.sign_msp", df_testR_msp)
  
  select_msp_data <- msp_fecal.filt10[rownames(df_testR.sign_msp), rownames(select_data)]
  select_msp_data.t <- t(select_msp_data)
  all(rownames(select_msp_data.t) == rownames(select_data))
 
  
  merged_data <- cbind(select_msp_data.t, select_data[match(rownames(select_msp_data.t),  rownames(select_data)), variable_select_clinic])
  

  list_correlation_variable[[names_file_cor]] <- list()
      

  res_cor <- rcorr(as.matrix(merged_data), type = "spearman")
        
  columns <- colnames(res_cor$r)[colnames(res_cor$r) %in% variable_select_clinic]
  rows <- rownames(res_cor$r)[rownames(res_cor$r) %in% unique(MSP_set$msp_id)]
        
  mat_cor <- res_cor$r[rows, columns, drop = FALSE]
  
  mat_corP <- res_cor$P[rows, columns, drop = FALSE]
  
  for (name_df in c("mat_cor", "mat_corP")){
    
    df <- get(name_df)
    
    if (sum(is.na(df)) >= nrow(df)){
    
      na_columns <- apply(df, 2, function(col) all(is.na(col)))
      df <- df[, !na_columns]
      
      assign(name_df, df)

    }
    
  }
        
        
  if (all(colnames(mat_cor) %in% variable_select_clinic)){
    
    colnames(mat_cor) <-  gsub("_", " ", colnames(mat_cor))
    colnames(mat_corP) <- gsub("_", " ", colnames(mat_corP))
  }
        

  if (all(rownames(mat_cor) %in%  MSP_set$msp_id)) {
    
    MSP_set$msp_id_name <- sapply(strsplit(MSP_set$msp_id_name, " sp\\."), `[`, 1)


    replacement <- setNames(MSP_set$msp_id_name, MSP_set$msp_id)
    
    current_rownames <- rownames(mat_cor)
    new_rownames <- replacement[current_rownames]
    
    rownames(mat_cor) <- new_rownames
    rownames(mat_corP) <- new_rownames
  }
        
  mat_cor2 <- mat_cor %>%
    as.data.frame(.) %>%
    rownames_to_column("clinic") %>%
    pivot_longer(-clinic, names_to = "msp", values_to = "val_cor")
  
  mat_corP2 <- mat_corP %>%
    as.data.frame(.) %>%
    rownames_to_column("clinic") %>%
    pivot_longer(-clinic, names_to = "msp", values_to = "val_pval")
  
  combined_mat_cor <- mat_cor2 %>%
    inner_join(mat_corP2, by = c("clinic", "msp")) 
  
  list_correlation_variable[[names_file_cor]][["ht_clinic_varibale"]] <- combined_mat_cor
        
  assign("ht_clinic_variable", heatmap_plot(mat_cor, mat_corP, lgd_title = "Correlation values", size_lgd_gp, size_label_gp,  rownames_size, colnames_size, annot = row_ha))
        
  
        
  lgd_cor = Legend(col_fun = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#D60C00FF", "white","#072AC8" )),
                   title = "Correlation values",
                   title_position = "topcenter",
                   direction = "horizontal",
                   labels_gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = leg_cor[[1]]),
                   title_gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = leg_cor[[2]]),
                   border = "black")

  lgd_group = Legend(labels = c(gps[1], gps[2]),
                     legend_gp = gpar(fill=c(group_bis_color[gps[1]],group_bis_color[gps[2]])),
                     title = "Groups",
                     title_position = "topcenter",
                     nrow = 1,
                     labels_gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = leg_gp[[1]]),
                     title_gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = leg_gp[[2]]),
                     grid_height = unit(leg_gp[[3]], "cm"), grid_width = unit(leg_gp[[4]], "cm"))

  pd = packLegend(lgd_cor, lgd_group,
                  direction = "horizontal",
                  column_gap = unit(1.5, "cm"),
                  row_gap = unit(3, "cm"))


  name_ht <- paste("ht", gps[1], gps[2], sep="_")
  legend_ht <- paste("leg", gps[1], gps[2], sep="_")
  
  list_plot_cor[[name_ht]] <- list()
  list_plot_cor[[legend_ht]] <- pd
  
  list_plot_cor[[name_ht]][["ht_clinic_variable"]] <- ht_clinic_variable
  
}
```

```{r,fig.height= 25, fig.width= 28, fig.show='asis'}
draw(list_plot_cor$ht_HC_GBA_NMC[[1]],   
     annotation_legend_list = list_plot_cor$leg_HC_GBA_NMC, annotation_legend_side = "top", padding = unit(c(2, 1, 1, 9), "cm"))
grid.text("B", 
          x = unit(0.01, "npc"),  
          y = unit(0.99, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"))
```


```{r, fig.height= 40, fig.width= 30, fig.show='asis'}
draw(list_plot_cor$ht_HC_PD[[1]], 
     annotation_legend_list = list_plot_cor$leg_HC_PD, 
     annotation_legend_side = "top",
     padding = unit(c(8, 0, 1, 25), "cm"))
grid.text("A", 
          x = unit(0.01, "npc"),  
          y = unit(0.993, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 40, fontface = "bold"))
``` 
 
# Extended Figure 7
```{r}
# CORRELATIONS CLINICAL VS MSP in groups

# list of variable for PD
select_clinic_var <- c("moca_total", "upsit_total", "DQS_score", "updrs_i_total", "updrs_ii_total", "updrs_iii_total", "updrs_total", "scopa_cardiovascular", "scopa_gastrointestinal", "scopa_pupillomotor", "scopa_sexual", "scopa_thermoregulatory", "scopa_urinary", "scopa_total", "rbdsq_total", "bdi_total", "hads_anxiety_total", "hads_depression_total", "wcs_total", "ledd_total", "pd_dur", "age", "bmi", "hoehn_yahr")

# variable selection for GBA_NMC and HC 
select_clinic_var_bis <- select_clinic_var[!select_clinic_var %in% c("ledd_total", "pd_dur", "hoehn_yahr")] # keep age and bmi
```


```{r}
## PD 
# The data used are correlation of species with clinical parameters in PD patients (n = 271).

# extract the clinic parameters and the 176 MSP abundance for 271 PD individuals 
PD_data <- temp_metadata %>% filter(group_bis == "PD") %>% dplyr::select(all_of(select_clinic_var))
PD_176abund <- msp_fecal.filt10[c(CE, NE, CD, ND), rownames(PD_data)]
PD_176abund_t <- as.data.frame(t(PD_176abund))
# dim(PD_176abund_t)
# dim(PD_data)

# checking
all(rownames(PD_data) == rownames(PD_176abund_t))

# merge clinic parameters and abundance of the 176 MSP
merged_PD <- cbind(PD_176abund_t, PD_data)

# compute spearman correlation
cor_PD <- rcorr(as.matrix(merged_PD), type = "spearman") 
mat_cor <- cor_PD$r
mat_corP <- cor_PD$P

# correlation and pvalue values between MSP abundance and clinical variables
merge_mat_cor_PD <- get_corr_and_pval(cor_PD, PD_176abund)
colnames(merge_mat_cor_PD)
merge_mat_cor_PD
```

 
```{r, warning=F}
## GBA_NMC 
# The data used are correlation of species with clinical parameters in GBA_NMC patients (n = 43).  

# extract the clinical parameters and the 176 MSP abundance for 43 GBA_NMC individuals (except : pd_dur and ledd_total)
NMC_data <- temp_metadata %>% filter(group_bis == "GBA_NMC") %>% dplyr::select(all_of(select_clinic_var_bis))
NMC_176abund <- msp_fecal.filt10[c(CE,NE,CD,ND), rownames(NMC_data)]
NMC_176abund_t <- as.data.frame(t(NMC_176abund))
all(rownames(NMC_176abund_t) == rownames(NMC_data))
# dim(NMC_176abund_t)
# dim(NMC_data)

# merge clinical parameters and abundance of the 173 MSP
merged_NMC <- cbind(NMC_176abund_t, NMC_data)

# compute spearman correlations
cor_NMC <- rcorr(as.matrix(merged_NMC), type = "spearman") 
mat_cor <- cor_NMC$r
mat_corP <- cor_NMC$P

# correlation and pvalue values between MSP abundance and clinical variables
merge_mat_cor_NMC <- get_corr_and_pval(cor_NMC, NMC_176abund)
```

 
```{r, warning=F}
## HC 
# The data used are correlation of species with clinical parameters in HC patients (n = 150).  

# extract the clinic parameters and the 176 MSP abundance for 150 HC individuals 
HC_data <- temp_metadata %>% filter(group_bis == "HC") %>% dplyr::select(all_of(select_clinic_var_bis))
HC_176abund <- msp_fecal.filt10[c(CE, NE, CD, ND), rownames(HC_data)]
HC_176abund_t <- as.data.frame(t(HC_176abund))
all(rownames(HC_176abund_t) == rownames(HC_data))

dim(HC_176abund_t)
dim(HC_data)

# merge clinic parameters and abundance of the 176 MSP
merged_HC <- cbind(HC_176abund_t, HC_data)
cor_HC <- rcorr(as.matrix(merged_HC), type = "spearman") 
mat_cor <- cor_HC$r
mat_corP <- cor_HC$P

# correlation and pvalue values between MSP abundance and clinical variables
merge_mat_cor_HC <- get_corr_and_pval(cor_HC, HC_176abund)
```




```{r}
# CORRELATION PD vs GBA_NMC

# merge correlation matrix of PD and GBA_NMC and 
# extract significant correlation between clinical and MSP
merged_corr_PD_NMC <- merge(merge_mat_cor_PD, merge_mat_cor_NMC, by = c("msp_id", "variable"))
merged_corr_PD_NMC <- merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(p_corr.x <0.05 & p_corr.y <0.05)

# create new column to indicate if correlations are all positive or negative
merged_corr_PD_NMC <- merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% mutate(same_corr_dir = ifelse(corr_dir.x == corr_dir.y, "yes", "no")) 
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "yes") 

# checking
dim(merged_corr_PD_NMC)
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% pull(msp_id) %>% unique() %>% length()
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "yes") 
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "yes") %>% pull(msp_id) %>% unique() %>% length()
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(variable == "hoehn_yahr")
merged_corr_PD_NMC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "no")
```



```{r}
# regression plot - PD and NMC 
formula <- y ~ x
reg_corr_NMC_PD <- ggplot(data = merged_corr_PD_NMC, aes(x = corr.x, y = corr.y)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color= same_corr_dir), size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F, formula = formula, linetype = 3, linewidth=0.8, color = "black") + 
  #stat_poly_eq(use_label(c("R2")), label.x = 0.1, label.y = 0.9, size = 7) +
  stat_correlation(method = "spearman", label.x = 0.1, label.y = 0.9, size = 7) +
  xlab("Spearman correlation in PD") + 
  ylab("Spearman correlation in GBA_NMC") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = 'none', axis.title = element_text(size = 16), axis.text = element_text(size = 16)) 

reg_corr_NMC_PD
```




```{r}
# CORRELATION HC vs PD 

# merge correlation matrix of PD and HC and 
# extract significant correlation between clinical and MSP
merged_corr_PD_HC <- merge(merge_mat_cor_PD, merge_mat_cor_HC, by = c("msp_id", "variable")) 
merged_corr_PD_HC <- merged_corr_PD_HC %>% filter(p_corr.x <0.05 & p_corr.y <0.05)

# create new column to indicate if correlations are all positive or negative
merged_corr_PD_HC <- merged_corr_PD_HC %>% mutate(same_corr_dir = ifelse(corr_dir.x == corr_dir.y, "yes", "no")) 

# check
dim(merged_corr_PD_HC)
merged_corr_PD_HC %>% pull(msp_id) %>% unique() %>% length()
merged_corr_PD_HC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "yes") 
merged_corr_PD_HC %>% filter(same_corr_dir == "yes") %>% pull(msp_id) %>% unique() %>% length()
```




```{r}
# regression plot
formula <- y ~ x
reg_corr_HC_PD <- ggplot(data = merged_corr_PD_HC, aes(x = corr.x, y = corr.y)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color= same_corr_dir), size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F, formula = formula, linetype = 3, linewidth=0.8, color = "black") + 
  #stat_poly_eq(use_label(c("R2")), label.x=0.1, label.y = 0.9, size = 7) +
  stat_correlation(method = "spearman", label.x=0.1, label.y = 0.9, size = 7) +
  xlab("Spearman correlation in PD") + 
  ylab("Spearman correlation in HC") + 
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none', axis.title = element_text(size = 16), axis.text = element_text(size = 16)) 

reg_corr_HC_PD
```


```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=14, fig.show='asis'}
# FINAL CORRELATION PD VS GBA_NMC/HC 
fig_corr <- ggarrange(reg_corr_NMC_PD, reg_corr_HC_PD, ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"), font.label = list(size = 17))
fig_corr
``` 
 

 
# Extended Figure 8

```{r}
pdms16 <- c("msp_1302","msp_0060","msp_0639","msp_0250","msp_0480","msp_0665","msp_0541","msp_1581","msp_1558","msp_0044","msp_0274","msp_0545","msp_0086","msp_0379","msp_0510","msp_0524")
pdms16_data <- HC_vs_PD_NMC.sign[pdms16,] %>% select(type)
pdms16_data <- pdms16_data %>% mutate(cat = ifelse(rownames(pdms16_data) %in% c(CE, NE), "PD_enriched", "PD_depleted")) 
```

```{r}
# extract the interest MSP abundance in HC and PD
abund_pdms_HC <- msp_fecal.filt10[rownames(pdms16_data), HC_ind]
abund_pdms_PD <- msp_fecal.filt10[rownames(pdms16_data), PD_ind]


msp_enriched <- pdms16_data %>% filter(cat == "PD_enriched")
msp_depleted <- pdms16_data %>% filter(cat == "PD_depleted")

HC_count_enriched <- colSums(abund_pdms_HC[rownames(msp_enriched),]>0)
HC_count_depleted <- colSums(abund_pdms_HC[rownames(msp_depleted),]>0)

PD_count_enriched <- colSums(abund_pdms_PD[rownames(msp_enriched),]>0)
PD_count_depleted <- colSums(abund_pdms_PD[rownames(msp_depleted),]>0)

# checking 
abund_pdms_HC %>% select(ASAPh_268) %>% filter(rownames(abund_pdms_HC) %in% c(CE, NE))
abund_pdms_HC %>% select(ASAPh_384) %>% filter(rownames(abund_pdms_HC) %in% c(CD, ND))

abund_pdms_PD %>% select(ASAPh_850) %>% filter(rownames(abund_pdms_PD) %in% c(CE, NE))
abund_pdms_PD %>% select(ASAPh_850) %>% filter(rownames(abund_pdms_PD) %in% c(CD, ND))
```



```{r, fig.show='asis'}
# checking
all(names(HC_count_enriched) == names(HC_count_depleted))
all(names(PD_count_enriched) == names(PD_count_depleted))

HC_pdms <- HC_count_enriched - HC_count_depleted
PD_pdms <- PD_count_enriched - PD_count_depleted

# define breaks 
breaks <- c(-Inf, -5, -2, 1, 4, 7, 10)
labels <- c("-7 to -5", "-4 to -2", "-1 to 1", "2 to 4", "5 to 7", "8 to 10")

# count occurence of PDMS score according to define breaks in HC and PD 
HC_pdms_occ <- table(cut(HC_pdms, breaks = breaks, labels = labels))
PD_pdms_occ <- table(cut(PD_pdms, breaks = breaks, labels = labels)) 

df_HC_pdms_occ <- as.data.frame(HC_pdms_occ) %>% mutate(group_bis = "HC")
df_PD_pdms_occ <- as.data.frame(PD_pdms_occ) %>% mutate(group_bis = "PD")
df_pdms_occ <- df_HC_pdms_occ %>% rbind(df_PD_pdms_occ)

# the barplot 
fig_pdms <- ggbarplot(df_pdms_occ, x = "Var1", y = "Freq", position = position_dodge(), xlab = "PDMS score", ylab = "Number of individuals", title = "PDMS 16 distribution", fill = "group_bis") + scale_fill_manual(values = group_bis_color[c(1,3)]) + theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.text = element_text(size = 13, color = "black")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 80, 10))

fig_pdms
```

 

# Extended Figure 9

```{r}
mod2 <- ftmt.nocore.fecal.baseline %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() 
    

mod_met2 <- mod2 %>%
              filter(rownames(.) %in% rownames(temp_metadata)) %>%
              merge(temp_metadata["group_bis"], by = "row.names") %>%
              column_to_rownames(var = "Row.names") 
```

```{r}
res_PD_HC <- testRelations2(x = mod_met2 %>%
                                   filter(group_bis %in% c("HC", "PD")) %>%
                                   select(-group_bis) %>%
                                   t(), 
                            y = mod_met2 %>%
                                 filter(group_bis %in% c("HC", "PD")) %>%
                                 mutate(group_bis = factor(group_bis, levels = c("HC", "PD"))) %>%
                                 pull(group_bis), 
                            type = "nonparametric", 
                            multiple.adjust = "BH")

res_GBA_NMC_HC <- testRelations2(x = t(mod_met2 %>%
                                   filter(group_bis %in% c("HC", "GBA_NMC")) %>%
                                   select(-group_bis)), 
                            y = mod_met2 %>%
                                 filter(group_bis %in% c("HC", "GBA_NMC")) %>%
                                 mutate(group_bis = factor(group_bis, levels = c("GBA_NMC","HC"))) %>%
                                 pull(group_bis), 
                            type = "nonparametric", 
                            multiple.adjust = "BH")
```

```{r}
modul_subgroup_filter <- module_subgroup %>%
                    filter(subgroup %in% c("CEM", "CDM"))
```


```{r}
res_PD_HC <- res_PD_HC[rownames(res_PD_HC) %in% modul_subgroup_filter$module,]
```

```{r}
res_GBA_NMC_HC <- res_GBA_NMC_HC[rownames(res_GBA_NMC_HC) %in% modul_subgroup_filter$module,]
```


```{r}
for (df in c("res_PD_HC", "res_GBA_NMC_HC")){
  data <- get(df)
  nm <- paste("cliff", gsub("res_", "", df), sep = "_")
  assign(nm, data[12])
  
}
df_cliff <- cbind(cliff_GBA_NMC_HC, cliff_PD_HC)
df_cliff$HC.PD_Cliffdelta <- df_cliff$HC.PD_Cliffdelta * -1
```


```{r include = FALSE}
# Compute Spearman correlation 
rho <- cor(df_cliff[,"HC.PD_Cliffdelta"], df_cliff[,"GBA_NMC.HC_Cliffdelta"], method = "spearman") 

# Construct plots 
p <- ggplot(data = df_cliff, aes(x = HC.PD_Cliffdelta, y = GBA_NMC.HC_Cliffdelta, group = NULL)) +
          geom_point(color = "black", size = 4, shape = 19) +
          theme_classic() +
          geom_smooth(method = "lm",  se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = 3, linewidth = 1) +
          stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., paste0("rho==", signif(rho, 2)), sep = "~~~")), 
                       vjust = 0.5, size = 7, output.type = "expression", parse  = TRUE) +
          labs(title = "A", x = "CD HC vs PD", y = "CD HC vs GBA_NMC") +
          ylim(-0.2, 0.3)+
          theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.17,
                              size = 21,
                              vjust = 3,
                              face = "bold"),
                legend.position = "none",
                axis.title = element_text(size = 21, color = "black"),
                axis.text = element_text(size = 19, color = "black"),
                axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3),
                axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4),
                plot.margin = unit(c(0.7,1,1,1.1), "cm")
              )
```

```{r include = FALSE}
df_cliff_barplot <- df_cliff %>%
                      pivot_longer(cols = everything(),
                                   names_to = "Groups", 
                                   values_to = "cliffdelta") %>%
                      group_by(Groups) %>%
                      dplyr::summarize("mean_cliffdelta" = mean(abs(cliffdelta))) %>%
                      mutate(Groups = factor(Groups, levels = c("HC.PD_Cliffdelta", "GBA_NMC.HC_Cliffdelta")))
                      


pbar <- ggbarplot(
  data = df_cliff_barplot,
  x = "Groups",
  y = "mean_cliffdelta",
  position = position_dodge(),
  color = "black",
  fill = "Groups"
) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),
                     limits = c(0, 0.24)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HC.PD_Cliffdelta"="#3d3d3d",
                               "GBA_NMC.HC_Cliffdelta"="#737373")) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.22,
                              size = 21,
                              vjust = 3,
                              face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(vjust = -1),
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 21, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 19, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0.7, 0.5, 1, 1.5), "cm")#, 
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 0.23, label = "****", size = 7) +
  labs(title = "B", x = "Comparisons", y = "CD absolute values") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("HC vs PD", "HC vs GBA_NMC"))

```

```{r, fig.height= 7, fig.width= 17, fig.show='asis'}
exfig9 <- grid.arrange(p, pbar, nrow = 1, 
             widths= c(1.1, 0.9))
exfig9
```


# Extended Figure 10
```{r}
# USA cohort
load("./data/verified_metadata_Wallen_PRJNA834801.RData") # metadata
load("./verified_merge_msp_data_Wallen_PRJNA834801.RData") # MSP abundance matrix 
dim(metadata.wallen.PRJNA834801) # 725 ind 
table(metadata.wallen.PRJNA834801$group)
dim(msp.merged.wallen.PRJNA834801)
```


```{r}
# Korea cohort 
load("./data/verified_metadata_Jo_PRJNA743718.RData") # metadata
load("./data/verified_merge_msp_data_Jo_PRJNA743718.RData") # MSP abundance matrix 
dim(metadata.jo.PRJNA743718) # 146 ind
table(metadata.jo.PRJNA743718$group)
dim(msp.merged.jo.PRJNA743718)
```


```{r}
# Turkish cohort 
load("./data/verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944.RData") # metadata
load("./data/verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.RData") # MSP abundance matrix
# removed 28 problematic samples 
verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 %>% 
    filter(is.na(excluded)) 
all(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID %in% colnames(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944))
verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 %>% 
    mutate(group = ifelse(health_status == "H", "HC", "PD"))
rownames(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944) <- verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID 

# Transform into numeric for bmi 
verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$bmi <- as.numeric(str_replace_all(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$bmi, ",", "."))

dim(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944)# 106 ind 
table(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$group)
dim(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944) 


# 86 individuals selected to make it comparable with the analysis SupTab3 in paper : Microbiome signatures of virulence in the oral-gut-brain axis influence Parkinson’s disease and cognitive decline pathophysiology
select_ind_tur <- c("ERS24550623","ERS24550783","ERS24550733","ERS24550822","ERS24550677","ERS24550620","ERS24550834","ERS24550716","ERS24550838","ERS24550649","ERS24550635","ERS24550713","ERS24550714","ERS24550656","ERS24550745","ERS24550763","ERS24550660","ERS24550812","ERS24550687","ERS24550786","ERS24550755","ERS24550645","ERS24550781","ERS24550670","ERS24550818","ERS24550712","ERS24550739","ERS24550663","ERS24550810","ERS24550743","ERS24550790","ERS24550720","ERS24550738","ERS24550776","ERS24550762","ERS24550825","ERS24550605","ERS24550764","ERS24550779","ERS24550731","ERS24550841","ERS24550803","ERS24550768","ERS24550629","ERS24550689","ERS24550644","ERS24550646","ERS24550811","ERS24550664","ERS24550766","ERS24550741","ERS24550785","ERS24550816","ERS24550659","ERS24550828","ERS24550626","ERS24550732","ERS24550791","ERS24550792","ERS24550711","ERS24550614","ERS24550752","ERS24550774","ERS24550747","ERS24550616","ERS24550831","ERS24550715","ERS24550665","ERS24550651","ERS24550734","ERS24550770","ERS24550777","ERS24550754","ERS24550612","ERS24550699","ERS24550782","ERS24550718","ERS24550634","ERS24550693","ERS24550685","ERS24550725","ERS24550830","ERS24550681","ERS24550618","ERS24550820","ERS24550666")


# checking 
all(select_ind_tur %in% verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID)
all(select_ind_tur %in% colnames(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944))

# Select the 86 individuals on metadata 
verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 %>% filter(sampleID %in% select_ind_tur)
dim(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944) # 86 ind 
table(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$group) # 86 ind : 17 HC and 69 PD

# Select the 86 individuals on msp abundance 
verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944[, verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID]
all(colnames(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944) == verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID)
```

```{r}
# Clinical data from Dusko - received in 24/10/25 
clinic_data_tur <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("./data/Turkish_MSP_and_metadata.xlsx")
index <- which(colnames(clinic_data_tur) == "mgp_sample_alias")
clinic_data_tur <- clinic_data_tur[, index:ncol(clinic_data_tur)]
clinic_data_tur <- clinic_data_tur %>% filter(!is.na(mgp_sample_alias))
dim(clinic_data_tur) # 86 ind 

# Replace missing values by real NA 
missing_values <- c("Missing_Data", "NA", "Not_Applicable", "") 

clinic_data_tur[] <- lapply(clinic_data_tur, function(col) {
  if (is.character(col)) {
    col[col %in% missing_values] <- NA
  }
  return(col)
}) 


# Make sure numeric values recognized as numeric variables  
is_numeric_column <- function(x) {
  all(is.na(x) | grepl("^-?\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$", x))
} 
numeric_cols <- sapply(clinic_data_tur, is_numeric_column) # the detected numerical variables 

# convert of numeric column into numeric variable type  
clinic_data_tur[numeric_cols] <- lapply(clinic_data_tur[numeric_cols], as.numeric)
```

```{r}
# List of clinical variables
var_tab_tur <- c("Disease_Duration", "NPI_Frequency-Severity", "WMS-VR_Short-Term_Memory", "ST_False_Answer", "GDS", "RBD", "UMPDHQ", "WMS-VR_Long-Term_Memory", "Benton_Line_Orientation_Test", "CDRS", "MMSE", "UPDRS", "Benton_Face_Recognition_Test", "Categorical_Fluency_", "Clock_Drawing_Test", "Phonemic_Fluency", "HYE", "Apathy", "DS_Backward", "DS_Forward", "OVMPT_Coding", "OVMPT_Recalling", "OVMPT_Recognition", "ST_Time_Difference")

# Select the clinical variables for merging
clinic_data_tur <- clinic_data_tur[, c("mgp_sample_alias", var_tab_tur)]

# Merge sample information and clinical information 
verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- merge(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944, clinic_data_tur, by = "mgp_sample_alias") 
rownames(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944) <- verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID 

# Same order of samples in metadata and abundance matrix 
verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944 <- verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944[, rownames(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944)]

all(colnames(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944) == rownames(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944)) # T 

# Specific character like "-" in column variable names caused errors, we replace them by "_" in metadata 
new_var_tab_tur <- str_replace_all(var_tab_tur, "-", "_") 

metadata_colnames <- colnames(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944)
metadata_colnames[match(var_tab_tur, metadata_colnames)] <- new_var_tab_tur
names(verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944) <- metadata_colnames 
```



```{r}
# Filter MSP abundance with prevalence > 10% 
# USA cohort
msp.merged.wallen.filt10 <- msp.merged.wallen.PRJNA834801[rowSums(msp.merged.wallen.PRJNA834801>0)>(ncol(msp.merged.wallen.PRJNA834801)*10/100),] #498 msp left
all(colnames(msp.merged.wallen.PRJNA834801) == metadata.wallen.PRJNA834801$sampleID) # TRUE 

# Korea cohort 
msp.merged.jo.filt10 <- msp.merged.jo.PRJNA743718[rowSums(msp.merged.jo.PRJNA743718>0)>(ncol(msp.merged.jo.PRJNA743718)*10/100),] 
dim(msp.merged.jo.filt10) # 572 MSP left 
all(colnames(msp.merged.jo.PRJNA743718) == metadata.jo.PRJNA743718$sampleID) # TRUE 

# Turkish cohort 
verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.filt10 <- verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944[rowSums(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944>0)>(ncol(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944)*10/100),] 
dim(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.filt10) # 606 MSP left 
all(colnames(verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.filt10) == verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$sampleID) # TRUE
```

```{r}
# HC vs PD comparison outputs 
# ASAP 
testR_asap_HC_PD <- testR_msp_HC_PD %>% invert_CD_direction()

# USA 
testR_wallen_HC_PD <- testRelations2(x = msp.merged.wallen.filt10, y = metadata.wallen.PRJNA834801$group, type = "nonparametric", paired= F, multiple.adjust = "BH")
testR_wallen_HC_PD <- testR_wallen_HC_PD %>% invert_CD_direction()

# KOR
testR_jo_HC_PD <- testRelations2(x = msp.merged.jo.filt10, y = metadata.jo.PRJNA743718$group, type = "nonparametric", paired= F, multiple.adjust = "BH")
testR_jo_HC_PD <- testR_jo_HC_PD %>% invert_CD_direction()

# TUR 
testR_clasen_HC_PD <- testRelations2(x = verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.filt10, y = verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944$group, type = "nonparametric", paired= F, multiple.adjust = "BH")
testR_clasen_HC_PD <- testR_clasen_HC_PD %>% invert_CD_direction()
```



```{r, fig.width=19, fig.height=14}
# Build Clifdelta's plots for ASAP between 3 public cohorts 
list_plot_asap_usa <- combine_CD_plots(testR_asap_HC_PD, testR_wallen_HC_PD, xlab = "CD - ASAP", ylab = "CD - USA")
list_plot_asap_kor <- combine_CD_plots(testR_asap_HC_PD, testR_jo_HC_PD, xlab = "CD - ASAP", ylab = "CD - KOREA")
list_plot_asap_tur <- combine_CD_plots(testR_asap_HC_PD, testR_clasen_HC_PD, xlab = "CD - ASAP", ylab = "CD - TURKIYE")

# Arrange plots
ext_usa <- ggarrange(list_plot_asap_usa$testR_merged.all, 
                     list_plot_asap_usa$testR_merged.sign,
                     list_plot_asap_usa$testR_merged.bothsign, 
                     ncol = 1, nrow = 3, labels = c("A", "D", "G"), font.label = list(size = 20))

ext_kor <- ggarrange(list_plot_asap_kor$testR_merged.all, 
                     list_plot_asap_kor$testR_merged.sign,
                     list_plot_asap_kor$testR_merged.bothsign, 
                     ncol = 1, nrow = 3, labels = c("B", "E", "H"), font.label = list(size = 20)) 

ext_tur <- ggarrange(list_plot_asap_tur$testR_merged.all, 
                     list_plot_asap_tur$testR_merged.sign,
                     list_plot_asap_tur$testR_merged.bothsign, 
                     ncol = 1, nrow = 3, labels = c("C", "F", "I"), font.label = list(size = 20)) 

ext_fig10 <- ggarrange(ext_usa, ext_kor, ext_tur, ncol = 3) 
ext_fig10
```

# Extended Figure 11 

```{r}
other_metadata <- c("metadata.wallen.PRJNA834801", "metadata.jo.PRJNA743718", "verified.metadata.clasen.PRJEB79944") 
other_abund_mat <- c("msp.merged.wallen.filt10", "msp.merged.jo.filt10", "verified.msp.merged.clasen.PRJEB79944.filt10")
other_cohort_name <- c("USA", "KOR", "TUR")

# Initialize lists 
list_qHC_abund <- list()
list_qHC_prop <- list()
list_qPD_abund <- list()
list_qPD_prop <- list()

# Compute abundance/proportion of coherent enriched/depleted species in HC and PD for each cohort
vec_group = c("HC", "PD")
for (i in seq_along(other_metadata)){
  metadata <- get(other_metadata[i])
  abund_mat <- get(other_abund_mat[i])
  
  # Get the detected species from CE and CD in given cohort
  CE_bis <- CE[CE %in% rownames(abund_mat)]
  CD_bis <- CD[CD %in% rownames(abund_mat)]
  
  # Compute abundance/proportion of CE/CD in HC/PD that are divided in quartile groups for each cohort
  CE_metrics <- compute_metrics(vec_group, metadata, abund_mat, CE_bis, "group", "sampleID", "E")
  CD_metrics <- compute_metrics(vec_group, metadata, abund_mat, CD_bis, "group", "sampleID", "D")
  
  # Stock the values in list for each cohort 
  cohort <- other_cohort_name[i]
  
  list_qHC_abund[[cohort]] <- list(CE = CE_metrics$HC_abund, CD = CD_metrics$HC_abund)
  list_qHC_prop[[cohort]]  <- list(CE = CE_metrics$HC_prop,  CD = CD_metrics$HC_prop)
  list_qPD_abund[[cohort]] <- list(CE = CE_metrics$PD_abund, CD = CD_metrics$PD_abund)
  list_qPD_prop[[cohort]]  <- list(CE = CE_metrics$PD_prop,  CD = CD_metrics$PD_prop)
}
```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=15}
# From created lists containing the abund/prop of CE/CD in quartiles groups of HC/PD, create the barplots of quartiles  
list_bp_qHC_abund  <- generate_barplot_list(list_qHC_abund, "Abundance (%)")
list_bp_qHC_prop   <- generate_barplot_list(list_qHC_prop, "Proportion (%)")
list_bp_qPD_abund  <- generate_barplot_list(list_qPD_abund, "Abundance (%)")
list_bp_qPD_prop   <- generate_barplot_list(list_qPD_prop, "Proportion (%)")
```


```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=15}
# Arrange the plots
bp_arranged_PD <- ggarrange(ggarrange(list_bp_qPD_abund$USA,  list_bp_qPD_prop$USA, labels = c("A"), ncol = 1), 
                            ggarrange(list_bp_qPD_abund$KOR, list_bp_qPD_prop$KOR, labels = c("C"), ncol = 1),  
                            ggarrange(list_bp_qPD_abund$TUR, list_bp_qPD_prop$TUR, labels = c("E"), ncol = 1), 
                            ncol = 1)

bp_arranged_HC <- ggarrange(ggarrange(list_bp_qHC_abund$USA,  list_bp_qHC_prop$USA, labels = c("B"), ncol = 1), 
                            ggarrange(list_bp_qHC_abund$KOR, list_bp_qHC_prop$KOR, labels = c("D"), ncol = 1),
                            ggarrange(list_bp_qHC_abund$TUR, list_bp_qHC_prop$TUR, labels = c("F"), ncol = 1),
                            ncol = 1)


bp_arranged_HC_PD <- ggarrange(bp_arranged_PD, bp_arranged_HC)
bp_arranged_HC_PD
```
